holdings.infoBox: YOKE is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.80%, Sandisk at 4.27%, EMCOR Group at 4.10%, Western Digital at 4.05%, and NVIDIA at 3.94%.

overview.description: The YOKE Core ETF (YOKE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks capital appreciation by employing a dynamic tactical allocation approach to global equity investing. The fund allocates its portfolio across three strategies focused on momentum, quality, and risk sentiment. YOKE was launched on Feb 21, 2025 and is issued by Yoke.
